name: kaiwa
description: Local-first Japanese conversation practice app (working title: Kaiwa)

scripts.test: npm run test:frontend && npm run test:backend
scripts.lint: npm --prefix frontend run lint && npm run lint:backend
scripts.format: npm --prefix frontend run format && npm run format:backend
scripts.setup: npm install && npm --prefix frontend install && uv sync --directory backend && npm run setup:dict
